title: Integrate editable Demo, Clone, and Feature Introduction in App
objective: Wire Sandbox load/save/reset, edited-snapshot Clone, Feature Introduction replay, and Emulator-only Clone repository behavior through App without weakening production boundaries.
acceptanceCriteria: Load, save, update, and Reset Demo Sandbox through the assigned store and Preview callbacks.
Pass the current validated Sandbox snapshot into Clone without mutating or resetting it.
Wire a visible Lobby 功能介紹 entry and Settings replay callback without changing onboarding state.
Keep existing Settings 功能導覽 contextual behavior unchanged and separate.
Keep Clone feature flag disabled by default and repository writes limited to Firebase Emulator.
Preserve create-only room semantics, ambiguous-result read-back, myTrips verification, repair state, and owner-only conversion.
Never write Demo Sandbox to myTrips or Offline Cache and never upload preview attachments.
Do not access production Firebase or modify Rules, dependencies, packages, or migrations.
